listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #441
listings.description: Full-service Pilot travel center at I-65 Exit 334 (AL-67, Priceville/Decatur). Open 24 hours with diesel lanes, 8 showers, laundry, Subway and Wendy's, DEF, Wi-Fi and an on-site CAT Scale. Listed with roughly 90 truck parking spaces (about 15 reserved, 15 paid).
listings.corroboration: Official Pilot Flying J location page (Priceville slug), plus Yelp and multiple truck-stop directories agree on address 3240 Point Mallard Pkwy SE, phone 256-353-5252, Exit 334, 8 showers and CAT Scale.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #441
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center #441 at I-65 Exit 334 (Point Mallard Pkwy, Priceville). Available with the truck stop's 24-hour operation.
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale presence at Pilot #441 is listed consistently by three independent truck-stop directories (truckstopsandservices, ParkAdvisor, TruckerGuide). The official catscale.com locator could not be fetched (egress-blocked), so the national CAT Scale number/site is used for contact.

listings.name: Truck & Trailer Parking off US-72 (Athens)
listings.description: 24/7-access gravel truck and trailer parking lot just off I-65 Exit 351 (US-72) in Athens, bookable through Truck Parking Club for hourly, daily, weekly or monthly stays. Restaurants and hotels are nearby.
listings.corroboration: Live Truck Parking Club listing page for 25845 US-72, Athens 35613; confirms 24/7 gravel lot, Exit 351 access, and paid/reservable (hourly-monthly) parking.

listings.name: Clarion Pointe Athens I-65
listings.description: Choice Hotels (Clarion Pointe) property at I-65 Exit 351 on US-72 in Athens. The hotel advertises a large truck parking area, free Wi-Fi, guest laundry and hot breakfast.
listings.corroboration: Choice Hotels official brand page (al720) plus Tripadvisor confirm the Athens I-65 Exit 351 location and the advertised truck parking area; phone 256-233-7500.

listings.name: Quality Truck & Auto Repair
listings.description: Heavy-truck repair shop offering 24/7 mobile roadside service, heavy-duty towing and tire work in Decatur, serving the I-65 / Beltline corridor (roughly Exits 334-340). Shop line 256-580-5643; 24-hour towing 256-476-7573.
listings.corroboration: Business's own site, Yelp and Find Truck Service agree on 546 Old Trinity Rd, Decatur 35601, 24/7 towing 256-476-7573 and shop 256-580-5643. Exit left blank because it is a city-location shop, not at a single I-65 exit.

listings.name: Athens Auto Tire & Wrecker Service
listings.description: Athens tire and wrecker service offering 24/7 tire repair and heavy-duty towing, near I-65 Exit 351 (US-72). Fixed shop with mobile/road service.
listings.corroboration: BBB, Chamber of Commerce and 4RoadService agree on 306 5th Ave, Athens 35611, phone 256-771-7537, offering 24/7 tire repair and heavy-duty towing.

listings.name: Clem Tire
listings.description: Tire dealer and auto/truck service center on US-72 (E Hwy 72) near I-65 Exit 351 in Athens, carrying commercial and semi-truck tires. Retail hours (not 24-hour).
listings.corroboration: Clem Tire official location page, Yelp and Find Truck Service agree on 908 E Hwy 72, Athens 35611, phone 256-232-7696; commercial/semi tires offered.

listings.name: Direct Wash Out (Direct Inc.)
listings.description: Truck, trailer and tanker wash-out and sanitizing facility in Priceville near I-65 Exit 334, serving vans, dumps and tankers.
listings.corroboration: Operator site (Direct Inc.), TruckWashRatings and Find Truck Service agree on 3703 Mountain Valley Rd, Priceville 35603, phone 256-355-1531, truck/trailer/tanker wash-out.

listings.name: Ardmore Welcome Center (I-65 Southbound)
listings.description: ALDOT Alabama Welcome Center on I-65 southbound near mile marker 363.7 (north of Exit 361, Ardmore area), rebuilt and reopened October 2024. Has restrooms, RV dump station and separate truck and car parking.
listings.hold_reason: No street address (mile-marker facility) and legal overnight-parking status for trucks could not be independently confirmed; per instructions rest-area overnight parking is not assumed even though truck spaces exist.
listings.corroboration: ALDOT News plus two rest-area databases confirm the southbound-only welcome center at MM 363.7 with truck parking and RV dump; direction and existence confirmed, overnight legality not confirmed.

listings.name: I-65 Athens Weigh Station (Southbound)
listings.description: Reported southbound commercial-vehicle weigh point on I-65 near mile marker 355.5 in the Athens/Limestone County area, described as weigh-in-motion in the roadway (no traditional scale house).
listings.hold_reason: Only a single non-official source (coopsareopen) describes this weigh-in-motion point; not confirmed on an ALEA/ALDOT official source and no scale-house/address to verify.
listings.corroboration: Single source (coopsareopen) gives SB weigh-in-motion at MM 355.5; held pending official ALEA/ALDOT confirmation.

listings.name: I-65 Athens Weigh Station (Northbound)
listings.description: Reported northbound commercial-vehicle weigh point on I-65 in the Athens/Limestone County area, described as weigh-in-motion in the roadway (no traditional scale house).
listings.hold_reason: Only a single non-official source (coopsareopen) references a northbound weigh-in-motion point; exact mile marker not given and not confirmed on an ALEA/ALDOT official source.
listings.corroboration: Single source (coopsareopen) references a NB weigh-in-motion counterpart to the SB point; held pending official confirmation.

listings.name: J Mart #1305
listings.description: Small fuel/convenience stop reported on Highway 67 South near I-65 Exit 334 (Priceville), listed with truck parking and 24-hour self-service diesel.
listings.hold_reason: Only a single directory reference; no verified street address/ZIP and current operation under this name could not be independently corroborated.
listings.corroboration: Single directory snippet (Highway 67 S, Priceville, 256-353-5980); insufficient corroboration to publish.

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop (Athens/Tanner area)
excluded.reason: No Love's could be confirmed on I-65 in Limestone/Morgan (Segment 1); nearest confirmed Love's are Cullman (Exit 305) and Falkville (Exit 322), both south of Decatur and out of segment. A stale directory entry ('Highway 20') could not be verified.

excluded.name: Sanicare Wash Systems
excluded.reason: Single directory source; State Docks Rd location is at the river port well off I-65 and current operation could not be corroborated.

excluded.name: Bulkmatic Transport Co
excluded.reason: Private bulk-carrier terminal tank wash, not a public truck wash.

excluded.name: T & T Tire
excluded.reason: Appears to overlap with Athens Auto Tire & Wrecker Service (shared phone/ownership); could not disambiguate as a separate truck-service location.

excluded.name: 4 Road Service (Athens dispatch)
excluded.reason: National mobile-dispatch directory brand, not a distinct physical local business; no street address.

excluded.name: FYX Fleet Services / Road Rescue Network / Atlanta Mobile Tire
excluded.reason: National/regional dispatch aggregators, not verifiable physical locations in this segment.

excluded.name: Owens Quik Mart
excluded.reason: Approximately 8 miles from I-65 on AL-24; outside the I-65 corridor for this segment.

excluded.name: Sibley Food and Fuel
excluded.reason: About 25 miles from I-65 Exit 340; outside the corridor.

excluded.name: Fuel Express
excluded.reason: On US-72 in Huntsville, ~24 miles from I-65; outside the corridor.

excluded.name: Cracker Barrel Athens
excluded.reason: Offers passenger/RV parking only, not designated truck parking; not a truck service location.

excluded.name: Pilot Travel Center (3240 Point Mallard 'Decatur' listing)
excluded.reason: Same facility as the published Pilot #441 Priceville listing (city correctly resolves to Priceville); excluded to avoid duplicate host row.
